name: The Damned Office
short_description: The Damned Office - An arcade first-person shooter (FPS) with survival-horror elements. Your task is survive in office building full of zombies. The only weapon you have is an old pistol, so you should use the available resources wisely. Explore the corridors, shoot zombies and just survive!
detailed_description:
The Damned Office - An arcade game first-person shooter (FPS) with survival-horror elements.

It was a normal work day. Hot coffee, meetings, emails. Nothing foreshadowed trouble. But suddenly the world turned upside down. Hordes of bloodthirsty dead people poured into the office, turning it into a deadly trap. Your colleagues, one after another, became victims of the curse, but you managed to survive. Now you are locked in a cursed office surrounded by zombies.

Your task is to get out of this nightmare alive. Go through the corridors of a horde of zombies and do not let yourself be tormented! Shoot zombies with an old pistol and get out of the office alive! Can you survive in this bloody madness?
